message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center

actor User
participant "Application" as App #E6E6FA#C0C0D8## 
box "#9AC7F4 Auto SDK Engine\n<<engine>>\nAuto SDK Engine" #A3CCFF ##  
  participant "" as engine1 hidden
end box
box "<<avs>\nAlexa" #B5EFBF ##   
    participant "" as alexa2 hidden    
end box


App ->> engine1 : Publish SendConnectivityEvent message specifying ACTIVATE_TRIAL event 

note right of App: clicks `Activate Trial` button \non screen to activate trial up-sell. 


alt ["Activating Paid Plan"]
   note over App:clicks `Activate Paid Plan`button onscreen toactivate paid planup -sell .
else["on failure "]
endif



@enduml
